[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1000000010 2
1 0010010000 2
2 0101100011 5
3 0110100000 3
4 1011101111 8
5 0110101010 5
6 1010010011 5
7 0011010101 5

01 10 1111101111 9

23 32 1110111011 8

70 07 0111110011 7

13 31 1011111111 9
24 42 0111111111 9
35 53 1011010111 7
46 64 0011010101 5 match 7
57 75 1111110111 9
60 06 0110110000 4
71 17 1111111111 a

03 30 1110110011 7

25 52 1111101111 9

47 74 0111110111 8
50 05 1111100111 8
